# Changelog

# 📦 7.0

## 📰 General changes and notes

Summary of changes here!

<details open>
<summary>Github Commits :octocat:</summary>
<blockquote>

- part 1 of adding french translate to quest  (#3946)
- * modification traduction
- modification des titres des chapitres, des titres des groupes. ajout des traduction des récompenses et modification du Nom du fichier du mod
- * Update apotheosis_2.snbt
- modification de la traduction depuis le fichier en_us
- * Update reward_table.snbt
- * Update welcome.snbt
- ajout de la description manquante de la quete commandes utiles
- * Update chapter.snbt
- * ajout de traduction
- modification de certains mots d'apotheosis et traduction de tips and tricks depuis en_us
- * Update chapter.snbt
- * Create Modern-Industrialization-2.4.1.jar
- modification de la traduction de la steam drill pour le remplissage de l'eau, pour le plus d'information et pour le changement de taille de forage  .
- * Update fr_fr quest chapter translations
- Refine French translations and formatting for FTB Quests chapters. Updated multiple quest descriptions and titles in config/ftbquests/quests/lang/fr_fr/chapters/tips_and_tricks.snbt (e.g. gateways, Easy Villagers → Simple Villageois, Iron Jetpacks → Jetpacks en Fer, Magnets → Aimants, Disenchanting Methods and several long quest bodies translated to French). Also cleaned up minor spacing/colon formatting and fixed trailing newline in config/ftbquests/quests/lang/fr_fr/chapters/welcome.snbt.
- * Update chapter.snbt
- * Add French quest translations (mainquestline_part_1)
- Add new SNBT localization file for FTBQuests: config/ftbquests/quests/lang/fr_fr/chapters/mainquestline_part_1.snbt. Provides French titles, subtitles and quest/task descriptions for the main questline (part 1), including various quest tips and instructions for ATM modpack content.
- * Update config/ftbquests/quests/lang/fr_fr/chapter.snbt
- Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
- * Update config/ftbquests/quests/lang/fr_fr/chapters/tips_and_tricks.snbt

- ---------
- Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
- fix: Update Cataclysm Configs (#4056)
- * fix: Update Cataclysm Configs
- Attempted to recreate configs 1:1 with the original wherever possible, except with the DPS Cap, where I took the following liberties:
- DPS Cap calculated based on the following formula: Original DPS Cap*New Damage Cap/Original Damage Cap
- Also removes old cataclysm config file to clear up redundancy.
- * Adjust Ender Guardian's Void Rune Damage
- Making it consistent with other void rune damage values
- update zh_cn quest translation (#4074)
- * update zh_cn quest translation
- * update Oritech zh_cn quest translation
- * update Industrial Foregoing zh_cn quest translation
- * update Apotheosis Foregoing zh_cn quest translation
- Updated PT_BR localization (#4082)
- - PT_BR Fix
- Rebalance Oritech Generators (#4111)
- fix: broken recipes and tags
- chore: modlist</blockquote>

</details>

<details>
<summary>ars_nouveau/tomes/urticantodin_tome</summary>

```diff
+{
+  type: "ars_nouveau:caster_tome"
+  color: {
+    b: 180
+    g: 25
+    id: "ars_nouveau:constant"
+    r: 255
+  }
+  flavour_text: " Traveling issues? Nonsense, all it takes is one leap and you get there in no time! Why the sticky feeling? Safety precautions, your legs aren't strong enough for the sudden stop with the ground, so we made them bouncy!"
+  name: ""
+  sound: {
+  }
+  spell: [
+    "ars_nouveau:glyph_self"
+    "ars_nouveau:glyph_leap"
+    "ars_nouveau:glyph_amplify"
+    "ars_nouveau:glyph_amplify"
+    "ars_nouveau:glyph_amplify"
+    "ars_nouveau:glyph_bounce"
+    "ars_nouveau:glyph_duration_down"
```
